design_philosophy: Dense table with keyboard-first inline actions; daily Importers scan and act fast.
strengths: Many records visible at once with eight columns and tight rows
Keyboard shortcuts on common row actions; submit from any field with Enter
Bulk-select speeds repeat actions across many files at once
weaknesses: Dense tables can overwhelm first-time or low-frequency users
Keyboard hints are subtle; new users may miss the fast paths
Tight rows leave less breathing room when reviewing errors
tradeoffs: Faster scanning and action for daily importers; less friendly for occasional users who need more space and explicit guidance.
use_when: Daily importers handling many files who know the product and prefer keyboard speed.
